subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamoured of the breaths of God! I have read thy letter, which cried out with thy love for God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی قرئت تحریرک الذی ینادی بحبک لله و انجذابک الی
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @love of God
